title: Audit all ESP32-S3 board .conf files for merge artifacts post-vwbb
description: Scan lichen/apps/*/boards/*esp32s3*.conf, firmware/bridge-zephyr/boards/* and any other board configs for leftover <<< === >>> merge markers, inconsistent SPDX headers, or divergent LICHEN_L2/CoAP comments. Ensure all follow the canonical consolidated style from the vwbb resolution. Update Kconfig.defconfig if impacted.
